panel = Panel('main')
panel.position = (1,1)

arr = Array(arr=V('arr', default=[]))
panel.add(arr)
arr.position=(1,0)


class CRect(Rect):

    def on_click(self, position: tuple[int, int]):
        self.height = 5
        return DebugCall('temp()')

rect = CRect(
    position = V('(0,n-i)',default=(0,0)),
    color = (255,100,100),
    height = 2,
    width = V('i', default=0)
)
rect.alpha = 0.8
panel.add(rect)

ar1 = Arrow(
    position = V('(0, j)', default=(0,0)),
    orientation = 'down',
    color = (0,0,255)
)
panel.add(ar1)

ar2 = Arrow(
    position = V('(0, j+1)', default=(0,0)),
    orientation = 'down',
    color = (0,150,255)
)
panel.add(ar2)
